mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_AI_CHAT_LOGS.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO AI_CHAT_LOGS ( user_id, session_id, user_input, ai_response, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{sessionId}, #{userInput}, #{aiResponse}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT chat_id AS chatId, user_id AS userId, session_id AS sessionId, user_input AS userInput, ai_response AS aiResponse, created_at AS createdAt FROM AI_CHAT_LOGS WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
